ocr.text: The Managed Services sector within the Asia-Pacific region has experienced notable growth and transformation in recent years,
driven by increasing demand for outsourcing solutions and cloud capabilities. This growth trend is reflected in Wipro's recent
analysis, which categorizes the managed services landscape into several key areas, including Outsourcing, CloudServices, and
ITServices. The data illustrates that in 2021, the Outsourcing category generated an impressive amount of $175M, showcasing
the robust market appetite for efficient and effective service delivery.
As organizations strive to enhance operational efficiencies and reduce costs, the reliance on managed services continues to rise,
resulting in a forecasted upward trajectory in these categories. The focus on CloudServices has also gained momentum, as
businesses increasingly migrate to cloud-based infrastructures to support their digital transformation initiatives. Similarly, the
ITServices segment remains integral, reflecting the ongoing need for comprehensive IT management and support amidst
evolving technological landscapes. As we delve deeper into the specifics of this growth, the following table presents a
comprehensive overview of the managed services growth metrics, including the year-on-year status, category breakdowns, and
forecasted trends that are critical for stakeholders and decision-makers in the industry.
